title: EPIPE write uncaught exception
rationale: EPIPE from stdout/stderr write escapes normal error handling as uncaught exception; reaches Sentry via onUncaughtExceptionIntegration. Needs boundary-level wrapping at the stream write call site.
prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until boundary-level fix
problemSignature: Uncaught exception with EPIPE errno from stream write bypassed resolveErrorCode and reached Sentry as raw exception.
